problem: What enzyme or organism efficiently degrades all plastic types at scale?
hypothesis: If Perovskite crystal structure optimization is applied to types, then function improves will occur because the mechanism targets the root cause directly.

experiment.protocol: In vitro biocompatibility assay with 30 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.
